replies.text: 🎯I got my associates in nursing from a community college and went to work at a large hospital in my state. Some of them eventually (years after working as nurses) went to get their degrees, but they always spent years just being clinical nurses. Today - I cannot tell you how many go right through to graduate with their Masters... without even working as a clinical nurse. Then these people become your PCP’s as Nurse Practitioners, or they become management... while never even being a competent nurse, never an experienced one. Nursing today is a scam - these people are more likely to be dangerous than knowledgeable.
